def maxAncestorDiff(self, root: Optional[TreeNode]) -> int:
        
        max_diff = 0
        stack = []
        max_ancestor, min_ancestor = 0, inf
        def dfs(root):
            nonlocal max_ancestor, min_ancestor
            nonlocal max_diff
            if root == None:
                return
            max_ancestor = max(max_ancestor, root.val)
            
            max_diff = max(max_diff, abs(max_ancestor - root.val), 
abs(min_ancestor - root.val))
                # compare cur value with the list.
            stack.append(root)
            dfs(root.left)
            dfs(root.right)
            stack.pop()
        dfs(root)
        return max_diff

    def kSmallestPairs(self, nums1: List[int], nums2: List
[int], k: int) -> List[List[int]]:

        heapq.heapify(nums1)
        heapq.heapify(nums2)
        while len(nums1) >= 2 and len(nums2) >= 2 and len
(heap) < k:
            if nums1[0] + nums2[1] > nums1[1] + nums2[0]:
                heap.heappush(heap, [nums1[1], nums2[0]])
            else:
                heapq.heappush(heap, nums1)
                heapq.heappop(nums2)
                heapq.heappush(heap, [nums1[0], nums2[1]])

        return heap
        #selecting either the first element of nums1 and the

def kSmallestPairs(self, nums1: List[int], nums2: List
[int], k: int) -> List[List[int]]:


        heap = []
        heapq.heapify(nums1)
        heapq.heapify(nums2)
        while len(nums1) >= 2 and len(nums2) >= 2 and len
(heap) < k:
            if nums1[0] + nums2[1] > nums1[1] + nums2[0]:
                heap.heappush(heap, [nums1[1], nums2[0]])
            else:
                heapq.heappush(heap, nums1)
                heapq.heappop(nums2)
                heapq.heappush(heap, [nums1[0], nums2[1]])

        return heap
        #selecting either the first element of nums1 and the 
second element of nums2, (0, 1), or the second element of 
nums1 and the first element of nums2, (1, 0), whichever has
